examples: After the service, the old man and the child walked to the parsonage.
The door of the parsonage was hardly shut, when the whole assembly came forward with outstretched hands and friendly greetings.
I moved out of the parsonage, got a job in a furniture factory and bought a used mobile home for $6, 000.
The Parsonage, built in 1863 for the neighbouring Dunmore Estate, was badly damaged in the fire.
The blaze broke out in a first-floor bedroom of the Parsonage, in Dunmore Park, on 5 July.
